title: 🎨 Graphical Proximity
short_description: Founder & Lead Designer of a hybrid marketing agency — helping brands tell powerful stories through design and strategy.
long_description:
## *📣 Graphical Proximity* — *Creating Your Story for You*
--- I founded **Graphical Proximity**, a creative hybrid marketing agency during my college life while working 60+ hours a week as a teacher and student. > “Our tagline: *Creating your story for you.*” --- ### 🚀 What I Do - End-to-end social media management - Story-based brand marketing - Website and domain setup - Logo & poster design for campaigns - Instagram-first content & strategy ### 👥 Clients Served - 👨‍🏫 A tutor building a personal brand - 💪 A protein supplement company - 🏢 A large-scale enterprise (under NDA) --- ### 🛠️ Tools & Stack - Canva, Figma, Photoshop - Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter - Trello, Notion (team management) --- ### 📈 Highlights ✅ Built a multi-client pipeline while still in college ✅ Successfully onboarded 3 real-world clients ✅ Created design + strategy in-house ✅ Managing a small but capable team --- ### 🔗 Links - [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/graphical_proximity/) - [Linktree](https://linktr.ee/graphicalproximity) --- > 💬 *“Graphical Proximity is more than a business — it’s my way of building stories that speak, sell, and stay.”*

title: 🖥️ ShadowFox
short_description: Solo Web Developer Intern building real-world interfaces and projects using JavaScript, HTML, CSS & more.
long_description:
## 🖥️ ShadowFox — Web Development Internship
--- I joined **ShadowFox** as a **solo web developer intern**, where I got to contribute to production-level websites, work on layout bugs, and integrate dynamic content. --- ### 🔧 What I Worked On - Responsive layout structuring & fixes - Page redesigns based on design briefs - Project integration using JSON & JS - Participated in feedback loops with mentors --- ### 💻 Technologies Used - HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript - Node.js, JSON APIs --- ### 📈 Highlights ✅ Overcame procrastination & shipped my first real portfolio ✅ Gained experience building industry-grade UI ✅ Learned fast by working independently --- ### 📄 Certificate [View Official Certification](https://link.com/certificate) --- > 💬 *“This internship was a mirror. I saw my own gaps, closed them, and grew stronger.”*
